title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses six security dangers posed by autonomous AI agents, examining vulnerabilities including prompt injection and credential exposure. The video covers how agent autonomy, tool integration, and memory mechanisms create real-world security risks and recommends safe usage practices.
